name: NVR INC
summary: NVR, Inc. is a Virginia-based homebuilder founded in 1980, operating as one of the largest in the United States. It constructs and sells single-family detached homes, townhomes, and condominiums under Ryan Homes, NVHomes, and Heartland Homes brands across 37 metropolitan areas in 16 states and Washington D.C. NVR also operates mortgage banking and title services through subsidiary NVR Mortgage Finance, Inc., originating loans exclusively for its homebuyers.

products.name: Ryan Homes
products.description: Single-family homes, townhomes and condos marketed to first-time and first-time move-up buyers in 37 metropolitan areas.

products.name: NVHomes
products.description: Homes marketed to move-up and luxury buyers in Delaware, New Jersey, Washington D.C., Baltimore and Philadelphia areas.

products.name: Heartland Homes
products.description: Homes marketed to move-up and luxury buyers in the Pittsburgh, PA metropolitan area.

products.name: NVR Mortgage Finance (NVRM)
products.description: Mortgage banking subsidiary originating loans exclusively for NVR homebuyers; also provides title insurance brokerage and title search services.

partnerships.description: NVRM is an approved seller/servicer for FNMA mortgage loans.
NVRM is an approved seller/servicer for FHLMC mortgage loans.
NVRM is an approved seller/issuer/servicer of GNMA mortgage loans.
NVRM is an approved seller/issuer/servicer of VA mortgage loans.
NVRM is an approved seller/issuer/servicer of FHA mortgage loans.
